transcript.text:
[A ramyun brand that shook South Korea in 2021] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Soft Tofu Yul Ramyun Noodles] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[They're not your everyday ramyun noodles]
[And Jumbo Yubu Chobap (fried tofu rice balls)?]
It's better than soft tofu soup
[Why's this here too?]
[Right, you need your dessert]
[It was so good that...]
[She went to work there?]
[Working an extra job?]
[What is she up to today...]
Hello everyone
I prepared ramyun mukbang today
It's been almost 4~5 months
There's this ramyun brand that's been in trend last year
I've been wanting to try it

I'm a little late to this trend
This was also popular too
Jumbo fried tofu rice balls
I enjoy them very much
Kimchi here too
Bon appetit
[Swirl some oil on the pan]
[Green onions]
That should be enough, right?
[1 more?]
[Nvm...]
[Stir fry]
Now for the chili peppers
[Stir fry]
Now some water
[Care for fire]

[Please be careful]
[Seasoning powder and flakes]
[About 3 spoonfuls of fish sauce]
This is like hangover jjamppong soup
Boil...
Do I need a cover?
[Shopping bag]
[Surprisingly effective]
[Open sesame...]
It's starting to boil
I'll just put it in
I can't wait
Now for the soft tofu
Right, this is it
[Was it always this tough...?]
[Egg yolk to finish it up]

Finished! Looks a lot better than expected, right?
Not bad at all
Looks delicious Bon appetit
[Time to fuel]
Eating the noodles with yolk is going to be great
I made it myself, but it's just so good
Soft tofu with some soup
This tastes better than soft tofu soup
[Very nice]
I love Yubu Chobap They have a lot of toppings
[Short rib patties]
Wait...
These are pretty big
It's impossible to eat it in 1 bite
I was worried that it got cold
But they're better cold

[Ramyun's perfect partner: kimchi]
I have to balance the portions out between these 2 dishes
Lovely
[Grilled eel]
[Didn't she just say it's impossible to eat it in 1 bite?]
They're too big to eat in 1 bite
This is soy sauce marinated raw shrimp
The portions are not balancing out
Even the soup and the noodles
I need a bowl
[Tuna mayo]
These can't go wrong
Alright
I'll cook some soup over there and bring it here
[More soup]
[Cleaning with her shirt]

This happens all the time
No, Jingu It's hot
Jingu!
[Stubborn]
[Listen to me!] Get down
Hey!
[Gave up]
Spicy beef bulgogi They're a bit red
[For me?]
[So adorable]
[But since it's dangerous...]
No!
[Another peaceful cat-day]
Spicy beef bulgogi
That's really spicy
Crab meat fish roe mayo

With some soft tofu
I don't like 'tofu'
But I like soft tofu
This goes so well with ramyun soup
Beef bulgogi
This is the best
Sorry, it's not balanced out
I'm almost finished with this
I'll just finish this first
And eat the Yubu Chobap with soup
Meat, meat, meat, and salmon So let's eat the meat
Snowflake Steak
Tasty!
I've been hooked on this beverage
Spicy pork kimchi
[Upgraded fueling method]

[Is it good?]
[Yup]
I've become a Synotex Face Mask model recently
I'll show them to you
Not because I became their model
It's easy to breathe in and it's very comfortable so I use it on the daily
Colors!
[Dark Gray]
[Dark Pink]
[Light Gray]
[Khaki]
[Beige]
[Light Pink]
[White]
[Black]
[You may purchase these in a variety of colors!]

Really easy to breathe in
They're made with natural materials, so it's also not bad for your skin
This company is known to do a lot of charity
So I got to participate in it with them
Promotion over! [Will be shown later]
Salmon!
This is their most popular item
There's always a reason why they're popular It's really good
[Drinking the soup!]
Last one!
Cheese fire chicken
[6 packs of Yul Ramyun noodles down]
[Nom nom]
[6 packs of noodles + jumbo yubu chobap cleared!]
I'll clean this up now
[Cleaning up]

[There's still more...?]
Ta-da
The face mask brand 'Synotex' and pizza brand 'Bong Sua Pizza' and I
got an opportunity to do some good deeds together
I wanted to try their pizza first before I go
Looks delicious
Rip it up!
[With Cheese Oven Spaghetti]
It's dessert
Half sweet potato and half beef steak
They use black rice dough
Look at the visuals
This is no joke
That's plenty of sweet potato mousse
So good
This is the best [She's already forgotten about the noodles]

[Dip some sauce]
This crust is legendary
Soft and chewy
[Now for some beef steak] Look at the size
This is crazy!
[Unintended ASMR]
The steak is so tender and tasty
It's a very juicy and tender chop steak
I'm going to be hooked on pizza for a while now
Get ready, all the pizza brands
The crust is really insane!
Oh, this is why!
Can you see this?
[Thin dough with lots of mousse]
[Time to fuel]
I got an error just now

The recorded footage is gone
Hopefully not the part where I showed the crust
Even all the crust-haters will enjoy these
[Hyerin/Ex-editor/Roommate] Do you want some pizza?
Even though I don't want to share
[You already know the answer, please don't say yes]
Do you want some?
I'll share this with her
[At the Synotex Face Mask company]
[Korea's top mask producing company known for their filter specialization, using it to make the air filter masks!]
[We deserve to breathe in fresh air]
[Regular masks run out of functionality over time, but Synotex masks are able to maintain it over time]
[With 5 different sizes and 8 different colors] [A bespoke mask with the possibility of a variety of styles]
[Link in the description box to make a purchase] [Use code 'Tzuyang' to receive a discount]
[5% of the revenues go to charity]
[Donating 8000 face masks today]

[Synotex deserves our love and support...!]
She told us that she wants to do charity work with us as she became our face mask model
so we agreed to participate in it with her
I hope our masks are given to the ones in need
[Off we go]
[Made a quick stop on the way]
[Bong Sua Pizza that she had earlier]
[Bong Sua Pizza's black rice dough]
[Never skimp out on food ingredients]
[They are working hard]
Tzuyang offered us a great opportunity to serve
It's going to good places, so of course we wanted to participate
We're all very happy and excited
I can even make 500 more pizzas
We received the face masks already,
And Bong Sua is donating 100 pizzas,

We'll head over to the orphanage after we load those up
[Let me help out too!]
[100 pizzas ready to go]
How many hours did this take?
About 4 hours
-Thank you -No, thank you!
[Clap clap]
Let's go deliver the face masks and pizzas
[Load the truck up with pizzas that kids love]
[Dong Myung Child Welfare Center]
[Leggo~]
Hello
Thank you all for coming
This will be a great Lunar New Year present for the kids
I want to thank you that we got the opportunity to participate
Face masks became mandatory because of the pandemic

So we're thankful that we can make an impact through this event
I wish good health and growth for the kids
Very thankful that we're able to do this with Tzuyang
[We hope that they are a little happier with these gifts]
I will try these on too then
Beautiful colors
[Looks great on you sir!]
My ears don't hurt anymore!
Thank you!
[Our 2nd stop: Don Bosco Youth Center]
Our kids will love it so much
They need masks too, right?
Yes, they wear them indoors during class
We were considering buying a bulk So we're so thankful for this donation
Thank you
Happy Lunar New Year

I want to give a special thanks to Synotex and Bong Sua [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Happy Lunar New Year! [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Have a Happy Lunar New Year!] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Beautiful Land Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
